evidence: LLDB could not launch on this host because debugserver is unavailable, so fallback runtime state capture was used. ReadCord(&output, -1) returned false, cleared the cord, and left CurrentPosition()==0. ReadVarintSizeAsInt() on ff ff ff ff 0f returned false with length=-1 and CurrentPosition()==0. WireFormatLite::ReadBytes() returned false, preserved the prefilled cord, and left CurrentPosition()==0. No dangerous negative-length read or state bypass was observed.
